name: Fabric Painted Strokes Shower Curtain Green - Room Essentials™
description:
Lend artistic flair to your bath space with this CVC Fabric Painted Strokes Shower Curtain from Threshold™. This decorative shower curtain features a paintbrush stroke-style print in green on a white background. Made from recycled polyester-cotton blend CVC fabric, this printed shower curtain features a buttonhole top for quick installation, while the machine-washable design allows for easy cleaning when needed.

Room Essentials™: Everyday Value
